# Location

A single location reference that may be represented using one or more equivalent methodologies (e.g., coordinates and an external identifier).

## Specializations of Location

| Class | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| [Address Location](AddressLocation.md) | A location referenced using a civic/postal address. |
| [Area Location](AreaLocation.md) | A location referenced as an area. |
| [Coordinate Location](CoordinateLocation.md) | A location that is referenced using point coordinates and/or point geometry. |
| [Linear Location](LinearLocation.md) | A location referenced along a network element using measure values. |
| [Network Location](NetworkLocation.md) | A location referenced relative to a transport network element. |
| [Offset Location](OffsetLocation.md) | A location referenced by an offset from another referent. |

## Formalization for Location

| Property | Constraint |
|----------|------------|
| subClassOf | [LocationReference](../LocationReference/) |
